'''natacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeal|zeal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeal|zeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| natacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nætæchæth|nætæchæth]] || [[word:nætæchæj|nætæchæj]] || [[word:nætæchæsh|nætæchæsh]] || [[word:nætæchæ|nætæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:natatachath|natatachath]] || [[word:natatachaj|natatachaj]] || [[word:natatachash|natatachash]] || [[word:natatacha|natatacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:natachath|natachath]] || [[word:natachaj|natachaj]] || [[word:natachash|natachash]] || [[word:natacha|natacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:natafchath|natafchath]] || [[word:natafchaj|natafchaj]] || [[word:natafchash|natafchash]] || [[word:natafchaf|natafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:natachatha|natachatha]] || [[word:natachaja|natachaja]] || [[word:natachasha|natachasha]] || [[word:natachaka|natachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:natachath|natachath]] || [[word:natachaj|natachaj]] || [[word:natachash|natachash]] || [[word:natacha|natacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:natachathal|natachathal]] || [[word:natachajal|natachajal]] || [[word:natachashal|natachashal]] || [[word:natachakal|natachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:natachathatha|natachathatha]] || [[word:natachajaja|natachajaja]] || [[word:natachashasha|natachashasha]] || [[word:natachaka|natachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:natachathan|natachathan]] || [[word:natachajan|natachajan]] || [[word:natachashan|natachashan]] || [[word:natachakan|natachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:natachathaoro|natachathaoro]] || [[word:natachajaoro|natachajaoro]] || [[word:natachashaoro|natachashaoro]] || [[word:natachakaoro|natachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
